name: Chrome Extension Installed with DevTools Permission
description: Detects the installation of Chrome extensions with developer tools permission. This permission grants the extension powerful access to the browser, potentially allowing for malicious activities like code injection, data exfiltration, and manipulation of browser behavior.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the detection event.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path where the Chrome extension is located.

parameters.name: permissions
parameters.description: A list or string indicating the permissions granted to the extension, specifically including 'devtools'.
